subcodes.first_line: O thou who journeyest unto God and hast emigrated towards Him! Praise be to the Eternal Beloved, that thou hast attained unto the shores of the Most Great Ocean [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مسافر الی الله و المهاجر الیه حمد محبوب لایزال را که بشاظی بحر اعظم رسیدی
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
